productName: Trichome Diamond Dusted Pre-Roll - Scented Marker #1 DDP - 1g
description: A hybrid blunt of Scented Marker taken up a level with concentrate — flower plus potent extract rolled together for a bold, slow-burning, full-flavored smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of diesel, chemical, and pineapple, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
